text: The word Ecclesiastes, like the Hebrew word it renders, should mean one who convokes an assembly, or addresses it, or both.

The Hebrew text here seems to imply that king Solomon was wiser than anyone who had reignedbefore him at Jerusalem, whereas David was in fact his only (Israelite) predecessor. But we need not attach too much importance to a conventional turn of phrase; cf. III Kg. 14.9.
